title: Duplicate groups by x no of duplicates
excerpt: I have a project with 34 different workshops, luckily for me two take place on each date so I only had to manually duplicate and rename 16 groups. Seriously, there has to be a better solution to this than manually duplic…

posts.author: HStothard (Helen Stothard)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a project with 34 different workshops, luckily for me two take place on each date so I only had to manually duplicate and rename 16 groups. Seriously, there has to be a better solution to this than manually duplicating a group manually and renaming features? Any one found a workaround yet?

posts.author: MaryJan (Mary Jennings)
posts.cookedHtml: You can automate group duplication in Monday instead of doing it manually. Use automation to duplicate groups based on triggers (like a date), and automatically rename them. For more flexibility, the Monday API can help automate this further if needed, and the free tier should be sufficient for smaller needs.
